hypothesis: F-EVAL1 has accumulated sufficient evidence for resolution. Closure classifier S462 scored 6/10 — predict S478 evidence raises all 5 dimensions to 2/2 = 10/10.
method: Re-score F-EVAL1 against M4 closure classifier (5 dimensions × 2 points). Cross-validate with eval_sufficiency.py S478 rerun, grounding_audit.py, and fairness_audit.py.
actual: 10/10 CLOSEABLE. All 5 dimensions maxed: evidence_saturation=2 (15+ measurement sessions, 3 correction rounds incl. adversarial capstone L-1210), test_clarity=2 (question definitively answered), recency=2 (S478 current session rerun), independence=2 (grounding_audit 81% poorly grounded + fairness_audit 2/5 fair independently confirm), partial_resolution=2 (PARTIALLY RESOLVED since S409, now fully resolved with honest assessment). Eval_sufficiency S478: SUFFICIENT 2.0/3 discrete, 88% continuous. All 4 goals capped at SUFFICIENT due to external_grounding=False.
diff: Predicted 10/10: actual 10/10 (exact match). Resolution was overdue — evidence saturated between S477 (grounding fix + adversarial capstone) and S478 (independent confirmation). The 16-session gap between classifier S462 and resolution S478 represents M4 latency.

closure_score_update.delta: +4 (1 in each of evidence_saturation, recency, independence, partial_resolution)
